basics.name: Shubham Shrivastava
basics.label: Product Manager & Business Analyst
basics.summary: Product Manager and Business Analyst with 5+ years of experience in e-commerce, fintech, compliance, and platform growth. Specialized in regulatory automation, risk analytics, fraud prevention, and data-driven decision-making to optimize efficiency and reduce operational risks. Partnered with the C-level executives of global banks, leading initiatives that automated regulatory reporting, reduced compliance costs, and improved fraud detection accuracy by 25%.

highlights: Spearheaded compliance automation, eliminating 500+ manual reporting hours annually and reducing operational costs by $450K.
Partnered with C-level executives to implement a risk-based reporting framework, decreasing compliance penalties by 40%.
Developed and deployed 5+ Power BI dashboards, enhancing risk assessment visibility and cutting significant reporting time.
Standardized business workflows using Visio, aligning compliance operations with ISO 20022.
Led UAT execution for 50+ test cases, achieving a 95% pass rate, reducing post-launch defects, and saving $100K expenses.
Redesigned fraud detection models, optimizing 12+ risk monitoring features, and preventing $1.2M in potential fraud losses.
Built interactive Power BI dashboards, driving a 15% increase in feature adoption and improving transaction monitoring accuracy.
Automated regulatory compliance reporting workflows using SQL & Python, cutting manual effort by 40%, saving $60K annually.
Executed A/B testing and data-driven experiments, refining fraud detection algorithms, improving detection speed by 20%.
Managed product roadmap execution, aligning compliance priorities with engineering, and legal teams for risk mitigation.
Led Salesforce data migration of 1M+ records, resolving 150+ inconsistencies, reducing post-migration cleanup by 40%.
Designed and deployed SQL-based validation scripts, increasing data accuracy, and preventing $30K in operational disruptions.
Executed UAT testing, achieving 100% test coverage, ensuring smooth deployment with zero compliance issues.
Managed project documentation, stakeholder communication, and budget planning, optimizing resource allocation.
Streamlined business workflows using Salesforce and JIRA, improving operational efficiency.
Facilitated project collaboration using Slack, enhancing team productivity.
Launched 10+ product features for a food delivery marketplace, decreasing order processing time by 18% and increasing checkout conversion rates by 12%.
Designed customer segmentation, driving a 10% increase in average order value, generating $500K in additional revenue.
Optimized UI/UX workflows using Figma, reducing engineering iterations and accelerating development speed.
Automated merchant onboarding, decreasing activation time, increasing partner revenue by $1M+ within six months.
Conducted A/B testing on marketing campaigns, improving user retention by 8% and reducing cart abandonment rates.
